subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Upon thee be My glory and My mercy. Well known is it that this Wronged One cherisheth His loved ones and their presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد علیک بهائی و رحمتی بسی معلوم این مظلوم دوستان را دوست میدارد و حضور
subcodes.subjects: @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @praise and encouragement, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
